title: ChiseAI Evidence Schema
description: Base schema for all evidence files in the ChiseAI validation system. Defines the structure for capturing validation results, test outcomes, and proof artifacts.

story_id.description: The story ID this evidence supports. Format: XXX-YYY-N (e.g., GOV-002-A, ST-123)

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the evidence was generated or the event occurred

validation_results.description: Container for all validation checks and their results

description.description: Human-readable description of what was validated

rationale.description: Explanation of the validation result, especially for failures

severity.description: Severity level of this validation check

timestamp.description: When this specific validation check was executed

metadata.description: Additional context specific to this validation check

all_passed.description: Whether all validation results passed (convenience field for quick checks)

agent.description: Name of the agent or system that generated this evidence

version.description: Schema version for this evidence file

branch.description: Git branch this evidence was generated from

duration_ms.description: Time taken to generate this evidence in milliseconds

tags.description: Tags for categorizing and searching evidence
